invariant: unmapped mutation capability = hidden legitimacy risk

surfaces.name: /execute runtime route
surfaces.known_gap: requires verification that executed object hash equals validated object hash
surfaces.closure_requirement: validated object hash must equal executed object hash

surfaces.name: /proof runtime route
surfaces.known_gap: proof must not exist without valid execution lineage
surfaces.closure_requirement: proof requires execution lineage, authority lineage, and object hash binding

surfaces.name: GitHub Actions governed deploy workflow
surfaces.known_gap: workflow must require canonical runtime validation
surfaces.closure_requirement: verify workflow cannot deploy without canonical validation and proof path

surfaces.name: Direct push to main
surfaces.known_gap: repository admin or branch override may bypass governed merge path
surfaces.closure_requirement: branch protection and root authority containment

surfaces.name: Direct Wrangler deploy
surfaces.known_gap: local authenticated deploy can bypass runtime legitimacy
surfaces.closure_requirement: contain local deploy authority or classify as explicit sovereignty assumption

surfaces.name: Cloudflare D1 console writes
surfaces.known_gap: raw registry mutation can bypass route-level lineage checks
surfaces.closure_requirement: classify as root database authority and prevent silent registry mutation

surfaces.name: Local terminal commands
surfaces.known_gap: human/operator shell can mutate repo, runtime, or deploy state
surfaces.closure_requirement: document as local operator root unless sandboxed or governed

surfaces.name: Neo4j graph ingestion
surfaces.known_gap: graph writes must not create authority or runtime legitimacy
surfaces.closure_requirement: ensure graph remains descriptive and non-authoritative
